title: BLE Scan Event
description: A single BLE device detection event emitted by the C++ scanner.

address.description: IEEE 802 MAC address of the detected device (upper-case, colon-separated).

name.description: Advertising name broadcast by the device (may be empty).

rssi.description: Received Signal Strength Indicator in dBm. More negative = weaker signal.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) when the device was detected.
